# savetokens.tips

> Token-saving techniques for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex), characterized like a component datasheet. Measured figures come from per-command raw-versus-filtered token deltas logged by the RTK proxy: 83.5% typical reduction across 92,695 proxied commands, snapshot 2026-07-18. Estimated figures carry no counterfactual and are marked as such.

## Pages

- [Measurements](https://savetokens.tips/): all techniques with measured versus estimated figures, per-command savings, FAQ
- [Token-saving guide](https://savetokens.tips/guide): practical guide, /clear versus /compact versus new session, caveman mode, agent copy blocks, auditing with /context and /usage, connector pruning, model routing, subagent economics, output filtering with RTK, further reading
- [About](https://savetokens.tips/about): who characterizes the data and how the figures are measured
